name: MultiValueInput
description: An input component that allows users to enter multiple values as tags/chips, with support for keyboard entry, removal, and custom separators.
usage_guidelines: Use for entering multiple email addresses, tags, or keywords.
Press Enter or comma to add a new value.
Click the remove button on a tag to delete it.

styling_info.visual_description: Input field with inline tag/chip elements that can be individually removed.

Do: Use for multi-value entries like emails or tags
Provide clear visual feedback for added values
Dont: Don't use for single value input
Don't use when a Select with multi-select is more appropriate
